title: Run Phase 3 AWGN simulation: Fig 7 GLDPC vs 5G NR LDPC
description:
Run the GLDPC vs 5G NR LDPC simulation from Figure 7.

## Figure 7: (1024, 640) QC-GLDPC vs 5G NR LDPC

- GLDPC: QC structure with eBCH check nodes, BP + SOGRAND
- LDPC: 5G NR, BP (I_max=50)
- Metrics: BLER, BER, queries/bit, iterations
- Eb/N0 range: 0–4 dB

## Acceptance Criteria

- Simulation runs to completion with sufficient statistics.
- Results compared against paper's reference data.
- GLDPC performance is documented relative to 5G NR LDPC.
- Results saved in CSV/JSON format.

## Location

Extend simulation runners.
